planning_summary: The azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container resource will be migrated into the avm-res-documentdb-databaseaccount AVM module as configuration of the sql_databases input, with its container properties directly mapped into the corresponding containers attribute. All required and relevant fields from the original resource are covered by the AVM module schema. Outputs remap to module outputs referencing sql_databases and containers.
transformation_description: Migrate azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container as configuration for sql_databases.containers within the AVM module (avm-res-documentdb-databaseaccount). The container will be nested under the appropriate sql_database mapping in the sql_databases input. The original resource block will be removed.

attribute_mappings.handling_reason: The container name maps directly from the azurerm resource to AVM input.
Container block must be grouped under the matching sql_database name in AVM input.
attribute_mappings.format_transformation_description: Map database_name to the parent sql_database object. Containers must be nested under sql_databases[var.cosmos_db_database_name].
attribute_mappings.additional_notes: This requires structuring the AVM input with a map, keyed by database name.

attribute_mappings.handling_reason: Paths directly map to AVM input.
Direct value assignment supported by AVM input with identical semantics.
Direct throughput property supported and matches intent.
Indexing policy mode requires structural transformation.
attribute_mappings.format_transformation_description: AVM uses set(object) and map(object) structure; indexing_mode value directly mapped.

attribute_mappings.handling_reason: Terraform syntax uses blocks; AVM expects lists. Convert included_path blocks to a list of paths.
attribute_mappings.format_transformation_description: Aggregate included_path block values into indexing_policy.included_paths list.

attribute_mappings.handling_reason: Terraform block to AVM list transformation.
attribute_mappings.format_transformation_description: Aggregate excluded_path block values into indexing_policy.excluded_paths list.

output_mappings.notes: Container output now referenced from module's sql_databases map structure.

risk_notes: Standard structural conversion; the only risk is ensuring correct grouping/nesting of databases and containers in the AVM module map. No loss of functionality.
